map.interpretation: Markers are public display locations for records, not proof, habitats, or populations.

registry.name: Australian Yowie Research
registry.ethicsNotes: Public AYR report pages only. Records are display/review signals and do not assert final truth or collect restricted material.

registry.name: OpenAlex
registry.ethicsNotes: OpenAlex public metadata only. Records are discovery/display signals for published works; no restricted full text is collected.

registry.name: Internet Archive
registry.ethicsNotes: Internet Archive public metadata only; no restricted full text is collected.

registry.name: Crossref
registry.ethicsNotes: Crossref public metadata only; no restricted full text is collected.

registry.name: National Trust and ABC public pages
English Wikipedia
registry.ethicsNotes: Small public collection round; verify source voice and publicness before analysis.

registry.name: ABC News
registry.ethicsNotes: Small public collection round; verify source voice and publicness before analysis.

registry.name: Art Gallery of New South Wales
Gunaikurnai Land and Waters Aboriginal Corporation
AIATSIS Public Catalogue
registry.ethicsNotes: Public metadata only. Exclude restricted, secret/sacred, unpublished, or community-controlled materials.

registry.name: Google Trends
registry.ethicsNotes: Attention signal only; relative interest is not a count of beliefs or communities.

registry.name: Manual Import
registry.ethicsNotes: Researcher must verify that each imported record is public and within scope.

registry.name: Modern Public Web
registry.ethicsNotes: Use only openly discoverable public pages. Do not crawl restricted or community-controlled materials.

registry.name: National Library of Australia Catalogue
registry.ethicsNotes: Catalogue metadata can identify sources for later review; it is not permission to extract restricted content.

registry.name: Research Data Australia
registry.ethicsNotes: Public metadata only. Treat cultural material descriptions as leads, not extractable content.

registry.name: Trove Magazines and Newsletters
registry.ethicsNotes: Use only publicly available Trove pages and metadata. Respect rate limits and rights statements.

registry.name: Trove Newspapers and Gazettes
registry.ethicsNotes: Use only publicly available Trove pages and metadata. Respect rate limits and rights statements.

registry.name: Wikimedia Pageviews
registry.ethicsNotes: Attention signal only; pageviews do not indicate endorsement, identity, or cultural authority.
